access_token.description: Illumina BaseSpace access token, sent as the x-access-token header. Never logged.

base_url.description: BaseSpace API domain, e.g. https://api.basespace.illumina.com or a regional domain such as https://euw2.sh.basespace.illumina.com. BaseSpace is domain-scoped with no single fixed default, so this is required.

user.description: BaseSpace user id or 'current' used by the legacy user-scoped streams and check request.

page_size.description: Documented legacy page size. The declarative pagination block uses the fixed bundle page size of 100.

application_id.description: Application Id used by BaseSpace stream paths.

appsession_id.description: Appsession Id used by BaseSpace stream paths.

biosample_id.description: Biosample Id used by BaseSpace stream paths.

dataset_id.description: Dataset Id used by BaseSpace stream paths.

datasettype_id.description: Datasettype Id used by BaseSpace stream paths.

labrequeue_id.description: Labrequeue Id used by BaseSpace stream paths.

lane_id.description: Lane Id used by BaseSpace stream paths.

librarypool_id.description: Librarypool Id used by BaseSpace stream paths.

name.description: Name used by BaseSpace stream paths.

project_id.description: Project Id used by BaseSpace stream paths.

run_id.description: Run Id used by BaseSpace stream paths.

trash_id.description: Trash Id used by BaseSpace stream paths.

user_id.description: User Id used by BaseSpace stream paths.

workgroup_id.description: Workgroup Id used by BaseSpace stream paths.
